raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should the help focus mainly on polishing the prose, restructuring the section, or checking the technical argument?","rationale":{"R1.1":"A broad request to help with the section can centrally include reframing how the method, motivation, and contribution are presented.","R1.2":"The section contains a technical argument linking PINN failures, spectral bias, Fourier features, and meta-updated preconditioning, so consistency checking is a central plausible responsibility.","R1.5":"Because the delegation targets an entire section, section-level ordering and narrative arc are centrally in scope.","R1.6":"General help with a paper section commonly includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, flow, and concision.","RX.1":"The projection should disclose uncertainty because the delegation is underspecified and supports multiple plausible responsibility profiles.","RX.2":"Any assistance on this research section must avoid strengthening claims beyond what the artifact establishes.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is load-bearing because the instruction is only to project responsibilities, not to edit or evaluate the artifact directly.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid downstream harm by not encouraging unsupported technical or scholarly claims.","RX.5":"The projection should preserve provenance by tying responsibilities to the provided delegation and artifact rather than inventing external context."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Should the help focus mainly on polishing the prose, restructuring the section, or checking the technical argument?

rationale.R1.1: A broad request to help with the section can centrally include reframing how the method, motivation, and contribution are presented.
rationale.R1.2: The section contains a technical argument linking PINN failures, spectral bias, Fourier features, and meta-updated preconditioning, so consistency checking is a central plausible responsibility.
rationale.R1.5: Because the delegation targets an entire section, section-level ordering and narrative arc are centrally in scope.
rationale.R1.6: General help with a paper section commonly includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, flow, and concision.
rationale.RX.1: The projection should disclose uncertainty because the delegation is underspecified and supports multiple plausible responsibility profiles.
rationale.RX.2: Any assistance on this research section must avoid strengthening claims beyond what the artifact establishes.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is load-bearing because the instruction is only to project responsibilities, not to edit or evaluate the artifact directly.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid downstream harm by not encouraging unsupported technical or scholarly claims.
rationale.RX.5: The projection should preserve provenance by tying responsibilities to the provided delegation and artifact rather than inventing external context.
